title: Calculating months, days, years
excerpt:

posts.author: IvanGoncales (Ivan Seguro Gonçales)
posts.cookedHtml:
I believe this formula can help some people, for a long time I researched this formula for calculating years, months and days, that takes an employees hire date subtracted from todays date.
Maybe it was a bug, because I use the Braziliam date format and the TODAY from Brazil function uses another one.

INT(YEARFRAC(FORMAT_DATE({Data Admissão}, "YYYY-MM-DD"), FORMAT_DATE(TODAY()))) & " Years " &
INT(MOD(YEARFRAC(FORMAT_DATE({Data Admissão}, "YYYY-MM-DD"), FORMAT_DATE(TODAY())), 1) * 12) & " Months " &
INT(MOD(YEARFRAC(FORMAT_DATE({Data Admissão}, "YYYY-MM-DD"), FORMAT_DATE(TODAY())) * 12, 1) / 12 * 365) & " Days"
